posts.title: Monochromatic Tweed Tailoring
posts.summary: Curate structured monochrome blazers and high-neck vests to marry Chanel structured elegance with raw Alexander McQueen styling rules. Exaggerated shoulder silhouettes remain a staple for autumn layering.

posts.title: Rebellious Leather Coordinates
posts.summary: Incorporate heavy hardware buckles and deconstructed leather crossbody bags into loose-fitting floral slip dresses. The contrast of soft drapery against metallic, hard accents creates a powerful rebel chic look.
